message:
fix: single-file root snapshot, HNSW 3-file persistence, and test simplification

Watcher fix for single-file roots:
- Handle single-file roots explicitly in collect_snapshot_for_root()
  instead of falling through to the directory walk which would error
- Adds test: collect_snapshot_supports_file_root

HNSW persistence refinement:
- Document 3-file persistence layout: .hnsw (metadata), .hnsw.graph
  (topology), .hnsw.data (vector payload) replacing the 2-file description
- Add serde_json dev-dependency for HNSW metadata serialization tests

Pipeline test simplification:
- Replace CompletionConflictSink (custom struct that opened a second DB
  connection to force conflicts) with SQLite triggers on
  document_embedding_status that reset the job to pending on insert/update
- Use Storage::open_in_memory() instead of tempfile-backed database
- Remove unused imports (io, PathBuf, Mutex, map_storage_error, JobStatus)

Formatting: fix closure indentation in searcher graph_candidates.map()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
